title: Law's Childhood in Flevance
description: Pages 1–5 focus on law's childhood in flevance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as law's childhood, the tragedy of Flevance, and his hatred for the world begin to explain why Doflamingo shaped his life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are we all out of trang rounds!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The animals are hurting themselves trying to escape!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Stop right there, you bloody pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How dare you look from the scene of a fire!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral MayNard! SABO and Admiral Isshou have stopped their duel! They're too injured to continue!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The pride of the Marines! Our greatest weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Some sort of God or something?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I don't wanna get mixed up in that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Just keep trying to control the chaos around you as best you can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: It is beyond your comprehension- sign...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Possibly do to a fallen tenryubito!? Can you even imagine!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: The hell are you talking about!?

summary: Law's Childhood in Flevance advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
